CVE-2021-21897.title: A code execution vulnerability exists in the DL_Dxf::handleLWPoly ...
CVE-2021-21897.summary: A code execution vulnerability exists in the DL_Dxf::handleLWPolylineData functionality of Ribbonsoft dxflib 3.17.0. A specially-crafted .dxf file can lead to a heap buffer overflow. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
